q: How do I get my HVAC business to show up on Google?
a: To show up on Google, your HVAC business needs three things working together: a properly built website with local SEO, a fully optimized Google Business Profile, and consistent citations across directories like Yelp, BBB, and Angi. Most HVAC businesses are invisible because they're missing at least one of these. Getting all three right — and keeping them maintained — is what moves you into the map pack and the top organic results. CaedoAi helps you dominate.

q: How long does SEO take for a business?
a: You'll typically see meaningful Google Maps movement within 6 to 8 weeks and organic ranking improvements within 3 to 6 months. The timeline depends on how little has been done on your site before. GBP results tend to come fastest. We show you ranking movement every single month so you're never guessing.

q: What if I don't like my website?
a: Tell us and we'll shift. You need someone who gets your style, that's non-negotiable.

q: What makes a website actually bring in calls?
a: A website that generates calls is built differently from a brochure site. It loads fast on mobile, has a click-to-call button above the fold, speaks directly to what the homeowner is searching for, and is structured so Google understands exactly what you do and where you do it. Most contractor websites fail because they were designed to look good, not to convert. Every site we build is optimized for the call, not the compliment.

q: How do I show up in AI search results like ChatGPT or Google's AI Overviews?
a: AI search tools pull answers from websites that are structured to answer specific questions clearly. This is called AEO — Answer Engine Optimization. We build your site with AEO in mind, so when someone asks 'best HVAC company in Oklahoma,' your business is the one that shows up.

q: How much does a website cost for an HVAC or plumbing business?
a: A professionally built trades website with real SEO capability starts at thousands of dollars as a setup fee, plus a hefty monthly retainer. Here at CaedoAi, we understand our customers and offer prices that fit their budget & fulfill their requirements.

q: Do I need Google Ads or is SEO enough?
a: For most trades businesses starting out, SEO and GBP should come first. They build an asset you own that generates calls for free, month after month. Google Ads generates calls while you're paying and stops the moment you do. Once your organic presence is established, ads can amplify it. Running ads without a solid SEO foundation is paying for a leaky bucket. We recommend getting the foundation right first.

q: How do I get more Google reviews for my business?
a: The most effective method is automated SMS follow-up sent immediately after a job is completed, when the customer is satisfied and the experience is fresh. A well-timed text with a direct link to your Google review page converts at a significantly higher rate than asking in person or following up days later. We set this system up for every client from day one.

q: Can I rank on Google if a bigger company dominates my area?
a: Yes. Larger companies often neglect hyper-local keywords, specific service pages, and suburb-level targeting because they're focused on broad terms. A well-structured local SEO strategy targets the searches that the big players miss — 'emergency AC repair [suburb],' 'furnace installation [neighborhood]', and wins there first. Those searches convert at a higher rate anyway because the intent is specific.

q: What if I already have a website?
a: We audit it on the call. If it's structurally sound and just needs SEO work, we'll tell you. If it's built on a template that can't rank or is hurting your Core Web Vitals, we'll tell you that too. We're not going to sell you a rebuild you don't need.
